---
title: 'CoolerSpace: A Language for Physically Correct and Computationally Efficient
  Color Programming'
author:
- Ethan Chen
- Jiwon Chang
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
- human_perception
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3689741
talk_source: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1Shz3h5ETzx3dnAmKQtW48fsHVr30STvZZHwkBJ37eW4/edit#slide=id.g2d49fe845d4_0_155
supp_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/oopsla24-supp.pdf
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/CoolerSpace
journ: OOPSLA
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 87
---
